overall.description: A first-person walk along a coastal city street in a video game (GTA V), starting on a wooden boardwalk past a green diner building, continuing through residential areas with palm trees, and ending along a cliffside road with a pedestrian bridge. The scene features wet pavement reflecting sunlight, moderate vehicle traffic, and ocean views.

transitioning from wooden boardwalk to concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet wooden boardwalk next to a parked white SUV. The camera walks past a blue recycling bin and a speed limit sign, continuing along the boardwalk past a mint green diner building with palm trees visible in the distance. The lighting shifts as the camera emerges from shadow into bright morning sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking past residential houses and parked vehicles along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: yellow and green dune buggy parked in driveway

modern white two-story house with dark windows

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along a concrete sidewalk past residential buildings. An orange house with white trim appears on the right, followed by a yellow dune buggy parked in a driveway. The segment ends as the camera approaches a modern white house with a brick paved driveway.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path with chain fence overlooking beach

turning left to follow the curve of the coastal road

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a path bordered by a chain link fence on the right overlooking a beach, with a steep sand cliff on the left. The scene opens up to a road intersection where the camera waits for a white SUV and other vehicles to pass before continuing along the coastal road.

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along a coastal road with the ocean visible on the right side beyond a white guardrail. A prominent white pedestrian bridge spans the road ahead. The camera approaches and passes underneath the bridge, revealing a modern stone house with ocean views on the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins on a shaded wooden boardwalk and gradually opens into a bright, expansive coastal road. It begins beside a parked white SUV and a blue recycling bin, moving past a mint green diner as the lighting shifts from deep shadow into brilliant morning sunlight. As the camera transitions to a concrete sidewalk, the environment shifts toward a residential neighborhood featuring an orange house and a yellow dune buggy before approaching a modern white home. The scene then opens up along a path bordered by a chain link fence and a steep sand cliff, pausing briefly at a road intersection to let a white SUV and other traffic pass. Finally, the camera proceeds along a coastal road with the ocean visible beyond a white guardrail, passing underneath a prominent white pedestrian bridge to reveal a modern stone house overlooking the water.
